commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab channel behavior scenario module, exports it from the QA runtime API, allowlists it in `qaImport`, and adds contract tests.

PR surface: Source +314, Tests +298. Total +612 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR's CI run reproduces the merge blocker with `pnpm check:architecture`, where the Madge check reports the new `channel-behavior-scenario.ts -> runtime-api.ts` cycle.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the import-cycle blocker without choosing a new product direction.

target.title: test(qa): add channel scenario driver contracts
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The QA real-E2E migration plan needs a reusable channel behavior contract before weak channel scenarios can be rewritten into meaningful QA Lab flows. Today those rewrites would have to stitch together low-level transport helpers one scenario at a time, which makes it easy to miss requirements like restart behavior, threaded replies, no-reply assertions, or provider metadata observation.

## Why This Change Was Made

Adds an inert QA Lab channel behavior scenario module with typed scenario definitions, expected reply/no-reply steps, gateway config patch metadata, restart/thread/reply requirement summaries, target/message helpers, and a `ChannelScenarioDriver` interface. The module is exported from the QA runtime API and allowlisted for `qaImport`, but this PR intentionally does not rewrite or reclassify existing QA scenarios.

AI-assisted: yes.

## User Impact

No runtime behavior changes for users or existing QA scenarios. QA authors now have a shared contract to build real channel scenario drivers and future QA-channel/live-channel rewrites against, instead of adding bespoke helper logic per scenario.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-behavior-scenario.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-flow-runner.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files`
- `pnpm deadcode:dependencies`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-behavior-scenario.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-behavior-scenario.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/runtime-api.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-flow-runner.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-flow-runner.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean after fixing three scoped findings around conversation-kind matching, threaded reply requirement detection, and non-channel thread targets.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
